prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 93.3 kg; Height 166.1 cm; BMI 33.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.6%; 6 months ago 6.1%; 3 months ago 5.6%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 92.9kg; 9 months ago 94.8kg; 6 months ago 93.2kg; 3 months ago 90.2kg; current 93.3kg), Height (12 months ago 166.1cm; 9 months ago 166.1cm; 6 months ago 166.1cm; 3 months ago 166.1cm; current 166.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 7U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 315mg/g; 9 months ago 295mg/g; 6 months ago 287mg/g; 3 months ago 268mg/g; current 203mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 160mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
